topic: what pundits and legends are saying about Kylian Mbappe

data.cta_english: Is the criticism fair or not?

segments.voice_english: Heavy backlash hit the superstar recently, so teammate Ousmane Dembele insisted the criticism went too far.
segments.subtitle_english: Heavy backlash hit the superstar recently, so teammate Ousmane Dembele insisted the criticism went too far.
segments.voice_hindi: हाल ही में सुपरस्टार पर भारी प्रतिक्रिया हुई, इसलिए टीम के साथी ओस्मान डेम्बेले ने जोर देकर कहा कि आलोचना बहुत दूर तक गई है।

segments.voice_english: Which is why French media slammed Kylian Mbappe after France suffered a painful semi-final loss.
segments.subtitle_english: Which is why French media slammed Kylian Mbappe after France suffered a painful semi-final loss.
segments.voice_hindi: यही कारण है कि सेमीफाइनल में फ्रांस की दर्दनाक हार के बाद फ्रांसीसी मीडिया ने किलियन म्बाप्पे की आलोचना की।

segments.voice_english: And it got worse because Kylian Mbappe looked silly sending a blunt message to Lionel Messi.
segments.subtitle_english: And it got worse because Kylian Mbappe looked silly sending a blunt message to Lionel Messi.
segments.voice_hindi: और यह और भी बदतर हो गया क्योंकि किलियन म्बाप्पे लियोनेल मेस्सी को एक स्पष्ट संदेश भेजते हुए मूर्खतापूर्ण लग रहे थे।

segments.voice_english: The bad news continued when Thierry Henry admitted Spain deservedly beat France in that clash.
segments.subtitle_english: The bad news continued when Thierry Henry admitted Spain deservedly beat France in that clash.
segments.voice_hindi: बुरी खबर तब जारी रही जब थिएरी हेनरी ने स्वीकार किया कि स्पेन ने उस संघर्ष में फ्रांस को हरा दिया था।

segments.voice_english: That was why Zlatan Ibrahimovic blasted a fellow TV pundit as ignorant after France lost.
segments.subtitle_english: That was why Zlatan Ibrahimovic blasted a fellow TV pundit as ignorant after France lost.
segments.voice_hindi: यही कारण है कि फ्रांस की हार के बाद ज़्लाटन इब्राहिमोविक ने एक साथी टीवी पंडित को अज्ञानी बताया।

data.youtube_title: Mbappe pe itna gussa? Dembele ne sabko Shock kar diya! 🤯
title_options: Mbappe pe itna gussa? Dembele ne sabko Shock kar diya! 🤯
Mbappe ne Messi ko challenge karke galti kar di? 💀
French Media ne Mbappe ko brutal tarike se kyun gher liya? 💔
data.description: Mbappe ke khilaaf French media aur fans ka gussa next level pahunch chuka hai! ⚽🔥 Semi-final loss ke baad sab unpar toot pade, par Dembele ne bola ki criticism 'too far' chala gaya hai. Messi par unka purana statement bhi ab backfire kar raha hai. Kya Mbappe par itna hate fair hai? Comment me batao! 👇

data.cta_english: Is Lautaro Martinez Inter's best leader? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: A relentless South American forward left his homeland early, but he conquered European football instead.
segments.image_query: dramatic South American football stadium night lighting
segments.subtitle_english: A relentless South American forward left his homeland early, but he conquered European football instead.
segments.voice_hindi: एक अथक दक्षिण अमेरिकी फारवर्ड ने अपनी मातृभूमि जल्दी छोड़ दी, लेकिन इसके बजाय उसने यूरोपीय फुटबॉल पर विजय प्राप्त की।

segments.voice_english: To achieve that level, Lautaro Martinez worked endlessly until Inter Milan brought him over.
segments.subtitle_english: To achieve that level, Lautaro Martinez worked endlessly until Inter Milan brought him over.
segments.voice_hindi: उस स्तर को हासिल करने के लिए, लुटारो मार्टिनेज ने तब तक अथक प्रयास किया जब तक इंटर मिलान ने उन्हें अपने पास नहीं ले लिया।

segments.voice_english: And it got better when the famous Italian club named him their permanent captain.
segments.image_query: Lautaro Martinez Inter Milan captain armband
segments.subtitle_english: And it got better when the famous Italian club named him their permanent captain.
segments.voice_hindi: और यह तब बेहतर हुआ जब प्रसिद्ध इतालवी क्लब ने उन्हें अपना स्थायी कप्तान नामित किया।

segments.voice_english: That same leader also leads the Argentina attack because his country trusts his talent.
segments.subtitle_english: That same leader also leads the Argentina attack because his country trusts his talent.
segments.voice_hindi: वही नेता अर्जेंटीना के आक्रमण का नेतृत्व भी करता है क्योंकि उसका देश उसकी प्रतिभा पर भरोसा करता है।

segments.voice_english: So this striker proved his worth after he rose from hopeful kid to leader.
segments.subtitle_english: So this striker proved his worth after he rose from hopeful kid to leader.
segments.voice_hindi: इसलिए इस स्ट्राइकर ने आशावान बच्चे से नेता बनने के बाद अपनी योग्यता साबित की।

data.youtube_title: Lautaro Martinez: Zero Se Inter Captain! 💔🔥
title_options: Lautaro Martinez: Zero Se Inter Captain! 💔🔥
Lautaro Martinez Ka Secret Success Safar 😱🏆
Lautaro Martinez Ne Kaise Badli Kismat? 🤯⚽
data.description: Lautaro Martinez ki struggle story sunke hosh ud jayenge! 🥹 South America se nikal kar Inter Milan ka captain aur World Cup champion banne tak ka safar insane hai. 🔥 Kya Lautaro Martinez abhi duniya ka best striker hai? Comment me batao! 👇⚽
